note: Alpaca API blocked by environment egress proxy. Data from web search. Rally continuing into power hour.

SPY.note: Estimated from S&P 500 at ~6499 (+2.45%). Continuing afternoon rally, testing $650 resistance.

QQQ.note: Estimated from Nasdaq at ~21490 (+3.34%). Tech still leading.

IWM.note: Estimated from Russell 2000 rally. Small caps lagging mega-cap tech.

DJIA.note: Surged 975+ points. Briefly above 1100 points earlier.

VIX.note: VIX pulled back from morning lows of 27.71 to 29.60 — vol compression stalling as afternoon progresses. Still HIGH regime.

cnn_fear_greed.label: Extreme Fear
cnn_fear_greed.note: Unchanged from earlier. Extreme fear persists despite massive intraday rally. Strong contrarian bullish setup.

macro.catalyst: Iranian President Pezeshkian signaled openness to negotiations. Trump willing to end war even with Hormuz closed.

oil.note: Oil off highs but still elevated. WTI ~$102. Crude dropped 11% on peace hopes.

macro.fed: Powell says rates are 'in a good place' to wait and see how Middle East situation resolves.

q1_performance.note: Worst quarter since 2022 for all major indices.

SPY.morning_action: Opened at $640.11, sold off hard to $629.29 (-1.7%)
SPY.midday_action: Massive reversal from lows starting ~12:00 ET
SPY.afternoon_action: Continuing higher, testing $650 round number resistance

gex_context.note: Pre-market GEX showed massive negative dealer gamma at 630-640. SPY blew through this zone, triggering a massive dealer short-gamma squeeze. Dealers were forced to buy shares to delta-hedge as calls went ITM, creating positive feedback loop.

market_regime.vix_regime: HIGH (29.60, off morning lows but still compressing from 30.81 open)
market_regime.trend: Strong bullish — V-reversal from morning lows, continuation into power hour
market_regime.dealer_gamma: Short gamma squeeze in progress. Dealers chasing the rally higher.
market_regime.iv_surface: Elevated. VIX rebound from 27.71 to 29.60 suggests some hedging activity. 0DTE call premiums would have been extremely profitable for morning low buyers.
market_regime.time_regime: POWER_HOUR_SETUP (2:00-3:15 ET) — institutional flows, MOC imbalances, quarter-end rebalancing

options_flow_context.note: No direct options chain data available due to API proxy block. Pre-market analysis showed 131:1 bear-to-bull GEX ratio at 630 strike. The rally through 630-650 represents a massive short-covering and gamma squeeze event.
options_flow_context.implied_move: GEX data suggested Daddy Bull at 654 ($0.69M) — SPY approaching this level
